Size: 20*36*9cm
Grandma ЁЯС╡ loves the wheat ear ЁЯМ╛ element, often seen on vintage jewelry ЁЯТН. At the 2010 Spring/Summer show, Karl Lagerfeld recreated a farm ЁЯСйтАНЁЯМ╛ scene at the Grand Palais. This woven bag ЁЯНГ is from this series. Soft and chewy, feels great, like lying in a barn ЁЯМ╛ pile ЁЯШМ. Only a relaxed seaside vacation ЁЯПЦя╕П matches a woven bag. The sea breeze ЁЯМК in early autumn is cozy and gentle, just like this charming woven bag ЁЯСЭ

items.name_en: LOтДоwтДоЁЯМЯ Soft Nappa Sheepskin Flamenco Purse features a pleated design with key details like the signature knot on the side. Stylish and versatile, it can be carried as a clutch, worn with the donut chain shoulder strap, or slung with the leather shoulder strap. This version is crafted from soft Nappa sheepskin. Shoulder, crossbody, or handheld*Detachable and adjustable leather strap*Detachable donut chain charm*Anagram embossed pebble texture*Subtle magnetic closure*Suede lining with gold or silver plating*(Matching metal chain extension leather shoulder strap)

items.name_en: LOтДоwтДоЁЯМЯNew Arrival ЁЯЖХ New Season Artist Collaboration Series Handbag. Collaborating with Japanese bamboo artist Hafu Matsumoto to present 4 bag styles. The new work uses flexible calfskin to simulate the natural form of bamboo, shaping a three-dimensional silhouette through weaving and knotting techniques. The Zen-inspired design features a Japanese wabi-sabi aesthetic.
